steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: The first sentences claim the DC-10 is far more aerodynamic than the Wright Flyer. The next sentence supplies the specific data point — its lift-to-drag ratio is more than twice the Wright Flyer's — that illustrates the claim.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Because the second sentence provides a specific example/data point that illustrates the prior claim (rather than contrasting with it or concluding the passage), Specifically, is the right transition. However and Nevertheless would falsely signal contrast; In conclusion would falsely signal a closing summary. That matches choice A — A is correct.
